from __future__ import annotations


class Embedder:
    def encode(self, text: str) -> tuple[int, int]:
        return (len(text), sum(ord(ch) for ch in text) % 97)


_CACHE: dict[str, tuple[int, int]] = {}


def handle_query(embedder: Embedder, query: str) -> tuple[int, int]:
    if query not in _CACHE:
        _CACHE[query] = embedder.encode(query)
    return _CACHE[query]
